---
title: "The Hon. Eva Mary Knatchbull-Hugessen"
---

## The Hon. Eva Mary Knatchbull-Hugessen

**Dates:** (d.23 Oct 1895)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1871-93)

### Biography

Daughter of the 1st Lord Brabourne, she was at Newnham College, Cambridge, 1883-6 and served as Librarian 1894-5. Some of her papers are in the Centre for Kentish Studies. [Margaret Wilson, <i>A Kent Girl-Graduate</i> (1994)]

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 1st  [1888]
- Letter from Jany 11th [1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
